import pandas as pd

data = {
    'name': ['Hong', 'Kim', 'Lee', 'Park', 'Choi'],
    'kor' : [85, 90, 78, 92, 88],
    'eng' : [80, 95, 82, 70, 88],
    'math': [90, 85, 88, 95, 92],
}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
print(df.head())
print(df.describe())
